title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Git and GitHub in VS Code
desc: Discover how to use VS Code to interact with GitHub and maintain your projects.

title: GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row
desc: We are committed to empowering every developer by building an open, secure, and AI-powered platform that defines the future of software development.

title: Beyond the engine: 10 open source projects shaping how games actually get made
desc: Check out these 10 open source tools that help game developers create art, animation, levels, audio, dialogue, debug UIs, and engine-ready assets.

title: Building GitHub’s next chapter in accessibility
desc: Explore our update on GitHub’s accessibility strategy, and learn how you can join us in building a culture of accessibility.

title: Investigating unauthorized access to GitHub-owned repositories
desc: If any impact is discovered, customers will be notified via established incident response and notification channels.

title: Changes to GitHub Copilot Individual plans
desc: We’re making these changes to ensure a reliable and predictable experience for existing customers.

title: From latency to instant: Modernizing GitHub Issues navigation performance
desc: How the GitHub Issues team used client-side caching, smart prefetching, and service workers to make navigation feel instant.

title: How GitHub uses eBPF to improve deployment safety
desc: Learn how Github uses eBPF to detect and prevent circular dependencies in its deployment tooling.

title: The uphill climb of making diff lines performant
desc: The path to better performance is often found in simplicity.

title: Continuous AI for accessibility: How GitHub transforms feedback into inclusion
desc: AI automates triage for accessibility feedback, allowing us to focus on fixing barriers—turning a chaotic backlog into continuous, rapid resolutions.

title: How we rebuilt the search architecture for high availability in GitHub Enterprise Server
desc: Here’s how we made the search experience better, faster, and more resilient for GHES customers.

title: GitHub availability report: April 2026
desc: In April, we experienced 10 incidents that resulted in degraded performance across GitHub services.

title: GitHub Copilot individual plans: Introducing flex allotments in Pro and Pro+, and a new Max plan
desc: Starting June 1, our lineup of individual plans will update based on your feedback.

title: Why age assurance laws matter for developers
desc: Youth safety requirements are moving down the tech stack to operating systems and app stores—raising new questions for open source developers.

title: How researchers are using GitHub Innovation Graph data to reveal the “digital complexity” of nations
desc: Researchers share in an interview how they used GitHub data to predict GDP, inequality, and emissions in ways that traditional economic data misses, along with our Q4 2025 data release.

title: An update on GitHub availability
desc: Here’s what we’ve done—and what we’re still doing—to improve our availability and reliability.
